'''maratha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:foamie|foamie]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:foamie|foamie]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| maratha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæræthæth|mæræthæth]] || [[word:mæræthæj|mæræthæj]] || [[word:mæræthæsh|mæræthæsh]] || [[word:mæræthæ|mæræthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mararathath|mararathath]] || [[word:mararathaj|mararathaj]] || [[word:mararathash|mararathash]] || [[word:mararatha|mararatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:marathath|marathath]] || [[word:marathaj|marathaj]] || [[word:marathash|marathash]] || [[word:maratha|maratha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:marafthath|marafthath]] || [[word:marafthaj|marafthaj]] || [[word:marafthash|marafthash]] || [[word:marafthaf|marafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:marathatha|marathatha]] || [[word:marathaja|marathaja]] || [[word:marathasha|marathasha]] || [[word:marathaka|marathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:marathath|marathath]] || [[word:marathaj|marathaj]] || [[word:marathash|marathash]] || [[word:maratha|maratha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:marathathal|marathathal]] || [[word:marathajal|marathajal]] || [[word:marathashal|marathashal]] || [[word:marathakal|marathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:marathathatha|marathathatha]] || [[word:marathajaja|marathajaja]] || [[word:marathashasha|marathashasha]] || [[word:marathaka|marathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:marathathan|marathathan]] || [[word:marathajan|marathajan]] || [[word:marathashan|marathashan]] || [[word:marathakan|marathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:marathathaoro|marathathaoro]] || [[word:marathajaoro|marathajaoro]] || [[word:marathashaoro|marathashaoro]] || [[word:marathakaoro|marathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|27df60f}}
